---
title: "HackUSU Project"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
    title-block-banner: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: body
    number-sections: false
    html-math-method: katex
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-copy: hover
    code-tools:
        source: false
        toggle: true
        caption: See code
execute: 
  warning: false
    
---

| <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7436643024329195520/?originTrackingId=FZWcJr8aAR0FExmXEjULfg%3D%3D">The Project details</a>
